title: African Exome Analysis Workflow
description: Nextflow DSL2 pipeline for whole-exome sequencing analysis of African populations, covering variant annotation, pharmacogenomic star-allele and HLA calling, FST and highly differentiated variant analysis, PCA and ADMIXTURE population structure, and novel-variant discovery. Underlies the manuscript "Pharmacogenomic diversity across 12 African populations".

creators.name: Mbiyavanga, Mamana
creators.affiliation: Computational Biology Division, University of Cape Town
